'''âz-f-y''' ('''zafaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monument|monument]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monument|monument]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-f-y
|-
! Lemma
| zafaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafayithi|zafayithi]] || [[word:zafayiji|zafayiji]] || [[word:zafayishi|zafayishi]] || [[word:zafayi|zafayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafayuthuth|zafayuthuth]] || [[word:zafayujuj|zafayujuj]] || [[word:zafayushush|zafayushush]] || [[word:zafay|zafay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafayuthu|zafayuthu]] || [[word:zafayuju|zafayuju]] || [[word:zafayushu|zafayushu]] || [[word:zafayu|zafayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafayufuth|zafayufuth]] || [[word:zafayufuj|zafayufuj]] || [[word:zafayufush|zafayufush]] || [[word:zafayuf|zafayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafayethe|zafayethe]] || [[word:zafayeje|zafayeje]] || [[word:zafayeshe|zafayeshe]] || [[word:zafaye|zafaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafayothoth|zafayothoth]] || [[word:zafayojoj|zafayojoj]] || [[word:zafayoshosh|zafayoshosh]] || [[word:zafay|zafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafayotho|zafayotho]] || [[word:zafayojo|zafayojo]] || [[word:zafayosho|zafayosho]] || [[word:zafayo|zafayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafayofoth|zafayofoth]] || [[word:zafayofoj|zafayofoj]] || [[word:zafayofosh|zafayofosh]] || [[word:zafayof|zafayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafayĂŠthĂŠ|zafayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zafayĂŠjĂŠ|zafayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zafayĂŠshĂŠ|zafayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zafayĂŠ|zafayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafayathath|zafayathath]] || [[word:zafayajaj|zafayajaj]] || [[word:zafayashash|zafayashash]] || [[word:zafay|zafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafayatha|zafayatha]] || [[word:zafayaja|zafayaja]] || [[word:zafayasha|zafayasha]] || [[word:zafaya|zafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafayafath|zafayafath]] || [[word:zafayafaj|zafayafaj]] || [[word:zafayafash|zafayafash]] || [[word:zafayaf|zafayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zafayasha|zafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozafayasha|gozafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizafayasha|gokizafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafaynĂŒsha|zafaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozafaynknĂŒsha|gozafaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizafaynĂŒsha|gokizafaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafayshĂ«sha|zafayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafaynkshĂ«sha|gozafaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafayshĂ«sha|gokizafayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafayrosha|zafayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafaynkrosha|gozafaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafayrosha|gokizafayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zafaymusha|zafaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafaynkmusha|gozafaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafaymusha|gokizafaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zafaysherasha|zafaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozafaynksherasha|gozafaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizafaysherasha|gokizafaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zafayngasha|zafayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozafaynkngasha|gozafaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizafayngasha|gokizafayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zafayasha|zafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozafaynkyasha|gozafaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizafayasha|gokizafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zafayamasha|zafayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozafaynkyamasha|gozafaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizafayamasha|gokizafayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafaynĂŒshĂ«sha|zafaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozafaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizafaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafaynĂŒrosha|zafaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafaynknĂŒrosha|gozafaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafaynĂŒrosha|gokizafaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafaynĂŒmusha|zafaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafaynknĂŒmusha|gozafaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafaynĂŒmusha|gokizafaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafayshĂ«nĂŒsha|zafayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozafaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizafayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafayshĂ«rosha|zafayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafaynkshĂ«rosha|gozafaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafayshĂ«rosha|gokizafayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafayshĂ«musha|zafayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafaynkshĂ«musha|gozafaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafayshĂ«musha|gokizafayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafayronĂŒsha|zafayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafaynkronĂŒsha|gozafaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafayronĂŒsha|gokizafayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafayroshĂ«sha|zafayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafaynkroshĂ«sha|gozafaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafayroshĂ«sha|gokizafayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafayromusha|zafayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafaynkromusha|gozafaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafayromusha|gokizafayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafaymunĂŒsha|zafaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafaynkmunĂŒsha|gozafaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafaymunĂŒsha|gokizafaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafaymushĂ«sha|zafaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafaynkmushĂ«sha|gozafaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafaymushĂ«sha|gokizafaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafaymurosha|zafaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafaynkmurosha|gozafaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafaymurosha|gokizafaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zafay|zafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠy|zĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozafay|hozafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠfĂŠy|hozĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozafay|hohozafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠfĂŠy|hohozĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzafay|nĂŒzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŒzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzafay|nĂŒnĂŒzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzafay|nĂŻzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŻzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzafay|nĂŻnĂŻzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzafay|luzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠfĂŠy|luzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzafay|luluzafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠfĂŠy|luluzĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizafay|lizafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠfĂŠy|lizĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizafay|lilizafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠfĂŠy|lilizĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozafay|kozafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠfĂŠy|kozĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozafay|kokozafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠfĂŠy|kokozĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezafay|kezafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠfĂŠy|kezĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezafay|kekezafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠfĂŠy|kekezĂŠfĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
